name: Lecso Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the onion and fry in hot oil.
2. Remove seeds and membranes from the peppers, then cut into rings or pieces and chop the tomatoes.
3. Add the chopped tomatoes to the frying onion and cook until softened.
4. Add the capsicums and continue cooking until they are soft.
5. Add rice and salt to taste.
6. Reduce heat to low, cover, and braise until the rice is cooked and the tomato is pulpy.
